title: Auto OP on first player
description: Automatically gives you OP if you are the first player joining server
body:
**NOTE: THE PLUGIN ONLY GIVES OP TO THE FIRST PLAYER**
## What does this plugin do:
- When the first player to join the server connects, it gives the player Operator
- Saves the player in a YML so it doesnt give OP to any other player
## Use-Cases:
- A server host that doesn't have a console
- You are too lazy to give yourself op

If you have any more use cases you can think of, feel free to email admin@enzonic.com with your suggestion
